title: How Often to Upload Shorts to Grow on YouTube
description:
Wondering how often to post YouTube Shorts in 2026? This video breaks down exactly how frequently you should be uploading Shorts to grow your channel -- without burning out or losing momentum.

YouTube's algorithm looks at how many views you get, how many people watch to the end, how they engage, and whether they actually enjoyed your content. We break down why posting every day tends to backfire, why once a week isn't enough, and why three to five Shorts per week is the sweet spot for most creators.
